Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Initial release of Telegram AI Provider Bot

- Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration with professional consultant prompt
- Vision support for image analysis
- Document processing \(PDF, DOCX, TXT\)
- Conversation context storage in PostgreSQL \(last 20 messages\)
- Commands: /start, /help, /clear
- Docker deployment with docker-compose
- Async architecture with aiogram 3.x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
